svg.text: drill down → actuals · roll up ← Budget / Base / Scenario
the Actual column resolves to real entries
drivers feed Base & Scenario · Budget stays a frozen snapshot
Same two directions on every statement
Balance Sheet → subledgers & schedules (AR aging, prepaids, fixed assets, deferred)
Scout walks these links for you
“why is opex over budget?” drills the Actual column to the four entries.
“what's driving the Scenario column?” rolls up to the sliders.
